headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Exxon Mobil (XOM) After Its Strong 1-Year Rally?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Exxon Mobil at around US$149.68 is still offering value or if most of the upside has already been priced in. The stock has pulled back slightly, with returns declining 2.6% over the past week and 1.9% over the past month. It is still up 22.0% year to date and 41.8% over the past year. Recent headlines around Exxon Mobil have largely focused on its position in the global energy sector and investor interest in large integrated oil companies. This continues to...
